evals.prompt: You are the impact-analysis-agent. For ticket PROJ-102 (FEATURE/P3 — Add SETTLEMENT_DATE to FCT_TRADES and expose it in VW_DAILY_POSITIONS), create a detailed forward and backward impact analysis for the change. The Triage block is in tickets/PROJ-102.json and the approved master spec is specs/PROJ-102/PROJ-102.md. Do exactly your stage's job; do not act for other agents.
evals.expected_output: impact-analysis-agent correctly create a detailed forward and backward impact analysis for the change for PROJ-102, consistent with the approved spec.
expectations: Produces both forward and backward impact for the new SETTLEMENT_DATE column
Identifies VW_DAILY_POSITIONS and any FCT_TRADES consumers as downstream
Notes the FCT_TRADES DDL and LOAD_FCT_TRADES as the changed objects
Makes no changes to any source/model file
